Googleの医療AI利用はどこまで 可能か || Googleの医療AI利用は製 … +53 lines 統制条件で段階導入するか」...
summary_text: Safe bounded fix was needed in finalization script, and I applied it. Changed file: - [run-slide-finish.js](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-finish.js#L76) What I fixed: - `PASS` variant finalization now hard-fails if source `output.pptx` or `output.pdf` is missing (`#L94`-`#L101`), preventing stale canonical artifacts from being silently reused. - `delivery-gate.selected.json` artifact contract now treats required files as required based on status/renderer (`#L123`-`#L125`, `#L158`-`#L164`). Verification: - Ran `node /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-slide-finish.js` - Result: `6 passed, 0 failed`. Exact command sequence to refresh canonical final artifacts from regenerated `structured-native`: ```bash node /Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-finish.js \ --delivery-dir /Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-guardrail-rerun-20260319/delivery \ --variant structured_native ``` Files to check after refresh: - [output.pptx](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-guardrail-rerun-20260319/delivery/final/output.pptx) - [output.pdf](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-guardrail-rerun-20260319/delivery/final/output.pdf) - [selected-variant.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-guardrail-rerun-20260319/delivery/final/selected-variant.json) - [delivery-gate.selected.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-guardrail-rerun-20260319/delivery/final/delivery-gate.selected.json) - [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-guardrail-rerun-20260319/delivery/variant-matrix.json)
